arts.ttl: How to watch Girona vs Arsenal: TV channel and live stream for Champions League today
arts.sum: Gunners almost certain to finish in the top eight and earn place in last-16

The Champions League has proven to be a step too far though, as they have been knocked out with six defeats from seven matches, including single-goal losses to Paris Saint-Germain, Liverpool and AC Milan. Girona have lost each of their last four Champions League games, failing to score a single goal along the way.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Girona: Champions League
arts.sum: Arsenal need just a point to secure their bye to the Champions League round of 16.

arts.sum: The Champions League's newly refurbished league phase concludes on Wednesday, and Arsenal travel to Girona hoping to at least secure a top-eight finish and qualify for the round of 16
